tasks.title: Create config/prometheus/ai-rules.yml with recording and alert rules
tasks.description: Create the Prometheus AI rule file with recording rules for latency P99/P50, token rate, and acceptance rate. Add alert rules for high latency, rework rate thresholds, and token budget. All recording rules use or vector(0). All alert rules have absent() guards and category: ai-capability label.
acceptance_criteria: Recording rules: ai:llm_request_latency_p99:seconds, ai:llm_request_latency_p50:seconds, ai:token_usage_rate:per_minute, ai:suggestion_acceptance_rate:ratio
Alert rules: AILLMLatencyHigh, AIReworkRateHigh, AIReworkRateCritical, AITokenBudgetHigh
All alerts have category: ai-capability label
All recording rules use or vector(0) guard

tasks.title: Add ai-rules.yml to Prometheus rule_files
tasks.description: Add '- "/etc/prometheus/rules/ai-rules.yml"' to the rule_files list in config/prometheus/prometheus.yaml, preserving existing references.
acceptance_criteria: Existing rule file references are preserved

tasks.title: Create stub docs/ai-runbook.md
tasks.description: Create a stub runbook document with sections for each AI alert: AILLMLatencyHigh, AIReworkRateHigh, AIReworkRateCritical, AITokenBudgetHigh.
acceptance_criteria: Each AI alert has an action section

tasks.title: Update docs/CHANGE_IMPACT_MAP.md with ai-rules.yml entry
tasks.description: Add a row to the config/ Changes table documenting that ai-rules.yml changes affect Grafana AI dashboard panels.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for AI rules in test_prometheus_config_validation.py
tasks.description: Add test class TestPrometheusAIRules verifying ai-rules.yml exists, rule_files includes it, recording rules exist, alert rules exist with correct labels.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify alert rules exist with category: ai-capability

tasks.title: Validate: yamllint, promtool check, and unit tests pass
tasks.description: Run yamllint on new YAML files, promtool check rules on ai-rules.yml, and run full unit test suite.
acceptance_criteria: pytest tests/unit/ passes with all tests green
